nodes.title: Dark Mode
nodes.description: Let users switch the app between light and dark themes.
nodes.businessValue: Reduces eye strain and matches OS preference, a top-requested setting.

nodes.title: As a user, I want to switch between light and dark themes, so that the app matches my preference.
nodes.description: A settings toggle whose choice persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: A theme toggle is available in settings.
The chosen theme persists across sessions.
testCases: Toggle to dark → every screen renders in dark theme.
Reload the app → the last chosen theme is still applied.

nodes.title: As a user, I want the app to follow my OS theme by default, so that it looks right without any setup.
nodes.description: Respect prefers-color-scheme when there is no saved preference.
acceptanceCriteria: On first load the app matches the OS theme.
testCases: OS in dark mode, first load → the app is dark.

nodes.title: Persist the user's theme preference
implementation: Add a theme column to user settings.

nodes.title: Build the theme toggle and dark palette
doneWhen: Every screen renders correctly in both themes.

nodes.title: Detect the OS theme on first load
implementation: Read prefers-color-scheme when there is no saved preference.
doneWhen: The first load matches the OS theme.

nodes.title: Charts stay light in dark mode
nodes.repro: Switch to dark on the dashboard.
nodes.expected: Charts recolor to the dark palette.
